name: Parallel
summary: The Parallel class contains methods for testing the parallelism of geometric objects.

methods.name: LineSegmentToLineSegment(LineSegment, LineSegment)
methods.signature: public static bool LineSegmentToLineSegment(LineSegment LineSegment1, LineSegment LineSegment2)
methods.summary: Returns true if the given line segments are parallel.

params.name: LineSegment1
params.doc: The first line segment to be used.

params.name: LineSegment2
params.doc: The second line segment to be used.

returns.doc: True if the given line segments are parallel.

methods.name: LineSegmentToLineSegment(LineSegment, LineSegment, Double)
methods.signature: public static bool LineSegmentToLineSegment(LineSegment LineSegment1, LineSegment LineSegment2, double Tolerance)
methods.summary: Returns true if the given line segments are parallel within the given angular tolerance.

params.name: LineSegment1
params.doc: The first line segment to be used.

params.name: LineSegment2
params.doc: The second line segment to be used.

params.name: Tolerance
params.doc: The angular tolerance (in radians) to be used.

returns.doc: True if the given line segments are parallel within the given tolerance.

methods.name: LineSegmentToPlane(LineSegment, GeometricPlane)
methods.signature: public static bool LineSegmentToPlane(LineSegment LineSegment, GeometricPlane Plane)
methods.summary: Returns true if the given line segment and plane are parallel.

params.name: LineSegment
params.doc: The line segment to be used.

params.name: Plane
params.doc: The plane to be used.

returns.doc: True if the given line segment and plane are parallel.

methods.name: LineSegmentToPlane(LineSegment, GeometricPlane, Double)
methods.signature: public static bool LineSegmentToPlane(LineSegment LineSegment, GeometricPlane Plane, double Tolerance)
methods.summary: Returns true if the given line segment and plane are parallel within the given angular tolerance.

params.name: LineSegment
params.doc: The line segment to be used.

params.name: Plane
params.doc: The plane to be used.

params.name: Tolerance
params.doc: The angular tolerance (in radians) to be used.

returns.doc: True if the given line segment and plane are parallel within the given tolerance.
